_source: Le Chevalier T et al. J Clin Oncol 2005;23:5910 (IALT); Douillard JY et al. NEJM 2006;355:1641 (ANITA); NCCN NSCLC 2025

Premed.Note: Palonosetron 0.5mg/Netupitant 300mg (Akynzeo) p.o. 1h pred chemo, Dexametazón 12mg i.v., Pantoprazol 40mg p.o. Hydratácia pred/po cisplatine: FR 500ml. Manitol 10% 250ml po cisplatine. Indikácia: adjuvantná liečba NSCLC štádium II-IIIA po R0 resekcii. Cisplatina 75-80 mg/m2 D1 q28d.

Instructions.Name: vinorelbine
Instructions.Inst: v 125ml FR i.v. počas 10 min D1, D8 (alebo p.o. vinorelbin 60 mg/m2 D1,D8 C1, potom 80 mg/m2 D1,D8)
